question: What are the major products and services that AMD sells as of FY22?
gold_answer: AMD sells server microprocessors (CPUs) and graphics processing units (GPUs), data processing units (DPUs), Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs), and Adaptive System-on-Chip (SoC) products for data centers; CPUs, accelerated processing units (APUs) that integrate CPUs and GPUs, and chipsets for desktop and notebook personal computers; discrete GPUs, and semi-custom SoC products and development services; and embedded CPUs, GPUs, APUs, FPGAs, and Adaptive SoC products.
predicted: As of FY22, AMD's major products and services include: (1) Data Center: server microprocessors (CPUs), graphics processing units (GPUs), data processing units (DPUs), Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs), and Adaptive System-on-Chip (SoC) products; (2) Client: CPUs, accelerated processing units (APUs) that integrate CPUs and GPUs, and chipsets for desktop and notebook personal computers; (3) Gaming: discrete GPUs, semi-custom SoC products, and development services; (4) Embedded: embedded CPUs, GPUs, APUs, FPGAs, and Adaptive SoC products. Additionally, AMD occasionally sells or licenses portions of its intellectual property (IP) portfolio.
reasoning: The question asks for the major products and services that AMD sells as of FY22. I need to locate the section that describes AMD's product portfolio. On page 4, there is an 'Overview' section that explicitly lists AMD's major products and services. This section states: 'We are a global semiconductor company primarily offering: server microprocessors (CPUs) and graphics processing units (GPUs), data processing units (DPUs), Field Programmable Gate Arrays (FPGAs), and Adaptive System-on-Chip (SoC) products for data centers; CPUs, accelerated processing units (APUs) that integrate CPUs and GPUs, and chipsets for desktop and notebook personal computers; discrete GPUs, and semi-custom SoC products and development services; and embedded CPUs, GPUs, APUs, FPGAs, and Adaptive SoC products.' Additionally, the document notes that 'From time to time, we may also sell or license portions of our intellectual property (IP) portfolio.' Pages 6-10 provide detailed descriptions of products organized by segment (Data Center, Client, Gaming, and Embedded), which further elaborates on these major product categories.
label: AL
